```{r Sepsis table}
q <- sepsis_rate_quartiles |> select(ends_with("_D") & !c(CVC_D, PVC_D))

tibble(
  name = c(trnsl$sepsisTable$Total, trnsl$sepsisTable$Pathogens, trnsl$sepsisTable$Commensals, trnsl$sepsisTable$Clinical, trnsl$sepsisTable$CsfPositive),
  total_sepses = total_sepses |> select(!c(CVC, PVC)) |> unlist(),
  total_sepsis_rates = total_sepsis_rates |> select(ends_with("_D") & !c(CVC_D, PVC_D)) |> unlist(),
  q1 = q |> slice(1) |> unlist(),
  q2 = q |> slice(2) |> unlist(),
  q3 = q |> slice(3) |> unlist()) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "name") |>
  tab_options(table.width = pct(100)) |>
  tab_header(title = trnsl$sepsisTable$Header) |>
  tab_row_group(label = trnsl$sepsisTable$PathogenSource, rows = 5) |>
  tab_row_group(label = trnsl$sepsisTable$Definition, rows = 2:4) |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = total_sepses, decimals = 0) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = trnsl$sepsisTable$IncidenceRate,
    columns = c(total_sepsis_rates, q1, q2, q3),
    id = "incidence_rate"
  ) |>
  cols_width(
    name ~ pct(35),
    total_sepses ~ pct(17),
    total_sepsis_rates ~ pct(12),
    q1 ~ pct(12),
    q2 ~ pct(12),
    q3 ~ pct(12)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_stub()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right"), weight = px(0))
    ),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_row_groups(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_stub(rows = trnsl$sepsisTable$Total)
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(paste0(
      "$$\\text{",
      trnsl$sepsisTable$IncidenceRate,
      "} = \\frac{\\text{",
      trnsl$sepsisTable$NumberOfInfections,
      "}}{\\text{",
      trnsl$sepsisTable$SumOfPatientDays,
      "}} \\times 1 000$$"
    )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "incidence_rate")
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    total_sepses = trnsl$sepsisTable$NoOfInfections,
    total_sepsis_rates = trnsl$globalTable$PooledMean,
    q1 = trnsl$globalTable$Q1,
    q2 = trnsl$globalTable$Median,
    q3 = trnsl$globalTable$Q3
  )
```
